src: This makes the assumption, of course, that the plants have not changed their habits since they were fossilized.
mt: 当然，这是基于这样的假设：植物在变成化石后没有改变它们的习性。

src: I'd go down through the choir practice room and St Andrew's chapel beneath it, make a quick call at the sacristy (where Holy Harding does his serving), then cross the quire to the south side, where, with the help of the Talisman of Shag, I would enter the-spiral stair at ground level, and so — relicless but, hopefully, bearing precious manna for the invalid — to the Sanatorium (formerly known as the Wheel Room) and, after that, bed.

src: Really we still know very little about what teachers actually do in the classroom and it's all very well standing back in university and saying teachers should do this and should do that, but in order to be able to offer guidance I think we really need to do more research in mixed ability classrooms to discover how teachers at the moment are dealing with the situation and where we might offer them more support, and that's the direction I'd like to see research going; rather than more of the grandiose large-scale quantitative studies, which collect lots of figures and statistics, I'd like to see a lot more studies in actual classrooms looking at actual teachers teaching, looking at what they do and how we can improve that.
mt: 事实上，我们对教师在课堂上实际做的事知之甚少，在大学里，我们站在后面说教师应该这样做，应该那样做，这很好，但为了能够提供指导，我认为我们真的需要在混合能力的课堂上做更多的研究，以发现教师目前如何应对这种情况，以及我们可以在哪些方面为他们提供更多支持，这就是我希望看到研究的方向；而不是更多的大规模定量研究，这些研究收集了大量的数据和统计数据，我希望看到更多在实际课堂上进行的研究，研究实际的教师教学，研究他们做了什么，以及我们如何改进。

src: All I was told is that you're getting twelve months guarantee, but you've got to have a three thousand mile service, and as the gentleman said erm I recorded the deliveries and sent them all back and on the third one, when I took it in I asked if they'd put a new set of points in for me and erm unfortunately when it came out there was no compression at all and because because I it was suggested that I dug my heels in a bit and got an independent report and erm basically they told me to get lost because it cost fifty pound to do the report.

src: In support of this contention he quotes research done by Thorpe, who found in a study of long-term foster-children that only 27 per cent had contact with their parents every six months or more frequently and that over 60 per cent of natural parents did not know where their children were living, with only 21 per cent feeling encouraged by their social worker to maintain contact.

src: According to Willie van Peer's introductory statement, the book is intended to promote a reconciliation between literary and linguistic approaches to the study of literature, and, more specifically, to provide a much-needed contribution in three fundamental directions: first, the development of a theory of textuality which accounts both for the way in which all texts function in society and for the differences between literary and non-literary texts; secondly, the construction of a model of literary communication that gives an adequate account of the complexities involved in the production and reception of literary texts; and thirdly, the development of more explicit and comprehensive accounts of the ways in which formal and contextual factors interact in the process of deriving interpretations from texts.
mt: 根据 Willie van Peer 的介绍性声明，这本书旨在促进文学研究中文学和语言方法之间的和解，更具体地说，是在三个基本方向上做出急需的贡献：第一，发展一种文本理论，既能解释所有文本在社会中的运作方式，又能解释文学文本和非文学文本之间的差异；第二，构建一个文学传播模型，充分解释文学文本的生产和接受过程中所涉及的复杂性；第三，更明确、更全面地解释形式和语境因素在从文本中得出解释的过程中如何相互作用。

src: We ran the experiment in 12 sessions of eight subjects each; eight of the sessions involved the eight groups, the remaining four sessions the subjects doing the experiment on an individual basis.

mt: Nynex Corp 的纽约电话公司与 Newbridge Networks Inc 达成了设备交易，以使其能够提供 Nynex 企业服务，该服务为企业客户提供专用线路服务，通过一次电话呼叫，他们就可以重新路由传输、添加新线路和提高可用带宽来设置视频会议：Newbridge 正在提供其 4602 MainStreet 智能网络站、3645 MainStreet 高容量带宽管理器和 3624 MainStreet 智能信道银行。

src: LIQUID ASSETS Brian Jordan takes a close look at the increasingly professional wines of England
mt: 流动资产 Brian Jordan 仔细研究了英国日益专业的葡萄酒

src: They were excellent in every aspect and always more than willing to give positive practical advice to allow hotel managers to conduct their business with the backing of a truly professional team.
mt: 他们在各个方面都表现出色，并且总是乐于提供积极实用的建议，让酒店经理在真正专业的团队的支持下开展业务。

src: This is seen as an important means of getting away from the elitist concept and encouraging everyone to take a longer view, even if his or her immediate task involves short-term objectives.
mt: 这被视为摆脱精英主义概念的重要手段，鼓励每个人从长远角度思考，即使他或她的眼前任务涉及短期目标。

src: We made two hundred and forty five pounds on Thriller of the Year one hundred and nineteen pounds on Tea for Two but that is after we've made the three hundred pounds donation to Whiston Hospital we made a thousand and eighteen pounds on the panto Wuthering Heights we lost four hundred and nine pounds, but that was basically that we do costume plays and have to hire the erm fixtures and set pieces from Wrightsons or wherever we're always going to be in this position and I think it's the tradition of the Garrick that we continue to do them, and I think we have to accept that we may have losses in future on those particular erm things.
LVC_candidate: make the three hundred pounds donation
mt: 我们在《Thriller of the Year》上赚了 245 英镑，在《Tea for Two》上赚了 119 英镑，但这是在向 Whiston 医院捐赠了 300 英镑之后，我们在《Wuthering Heights》上赚了 118 英镑，损失了 409 英镑，但基本上我们做的是服装剧，必须从 Wrightsons 或其他地方租用道具和布景，我们总是处于这种状况，我认为这是加里克的传统，我们必须继续这样做，我认为我们必须接受，我们可能会在未来在这些特定的事情上遭受损失。

src: For some reason, although she had not been doing the cooking, this made Lydia feel like Lucretia Borgia.
mt: 由于某种原因，虽然她没有做饭，这让她觉得自己像卢克丽霞·博吉亚。

mt: 不过，我八岁左右的时候问她做了什么，她却对我说，她曾在办公室工作，做过文书工作。

mt: 黑色花卉是一种别致的选择，尤其是在露台、阳台或小花园里，它们在白色墙壁或吊篮上看起来很漂亮。

mt: 即便如此，当兄弟俩不久后离开时，扬托和比利还是难以掩饰他们的喜悦。

src: One would expect some cases to get widespread coverage, especially when there is serious re-offending after a previous life sentence.

src: Some see it and have sound explanations, like one Magar lady in rural west central Nepal who gave a ten-minute lecture to me on the problems of the transference of fertility from forest to arable land, and changing uses of crop residues with increasing population pressure, that would have stood up well in a graduate seminar.
mt: 有些人看到了这一点，并对此有很好的解释，比如尼泊尔中西部农村的一位马加尔女士，她给我讲了十分钟的课，内容是关于森林向可耕地转移的肥力问题，以及随着人口压力增加而改变作物残留物用途的问题，这在研究生研讨会上会得到很好的反响。

mt: 年长的亲戚尽了他们所能，但这意味着他一生都无法轻松一点——他甚至活不到四十岁——如果他生病或累了，没有人可以依靠他来做这项工作。

src: He then suggests that the former can either directly create the conditions for the reproduction of the relations of production, presumably by quelling any sign of working class insubordination (i.e., a feature of economic practice depends upon political practice), or they can do so indirectly, by establishing a situation in which ideological state apparatuses can do their work (i.e., in which ideological practice determines economic practice).
mt: 然后，他认为前者要么直接为生产关系的再生产创造条件，大概通过镇压工人阶级任何不服从的迹象（即经济实践的特征取决于政治实践），要么间接地通过建立一种意识形态国家机器可以发挥作用的局面（即意识形态实践决定经济实践）。

src: If holist forms of explanation are to merit serious consideration, they must clearly be based on more than an uncritical acceptance of a crude version of historical materialism, and the claim that they are not threatened by counterfactuals such as those discussed at the start of the chapter must be given a less doctrinaire justification.
mt: 如果要认真考虑整体主义的解释形式，它们必须明确地建立在对一种粗略的历史唯物主义的无批判接受之上，并且必须给出一个不那么教条的理由来证明它们不受本章开头讨论的那些反事实的威胁。

mt: 虽然他几乎没有把目光从她身上移开，但很明显，她并没有给他留下什么好印象。

src: Conduct within the second category, for example, a donation to charity, will sometimes be sufficiently disconnected from ordinary business practice to make an attack on motive potentially more manageable.
mt: 第二类行为，例如，向慈善机构捐款，有时与普通商业行为的关联度很低，因此，对动机的攻击可能更容易控制。

src: So it makes a refreshing change to able to write about something nice.
mt: 所以，能够写点好东西，真是令人耳目一新。

src: We could probably only charge about £4 a ticket, so even if we could do an Eastern European tour, we'd lose so much money on it.
mt: 我们可能只能收取 4 英镑的门票价，所以即使我们能去东欧巡演，我们也会损失很多钱。

src: Statements of intention not to make an offer
mt: 意向声明：不打算进行要约

src: A few reassurances later and she was on her way to do battle at the bridge table.
mt: 经过几次安慰，她便出发去桥牌桌了。

src: If Marryat made this choice, it was because he wrote from within the experience of many years serving in the navy from 1806, not continuously but when employment was available: more than one of his novels was written in the cabin of a ship under his command.
mt: 如果玛丽亚特做出了这样的选择，那是因为他从 1806 年开始在海军服役多年，不是连续服役，而是有工作的时候：他的多部小说都是在船舱里写的。

src: Marryat — as a writer read by boys, men being already too dulled in the sense at twenty to appreciate him — has probably, through the boys, exercised the greatest influence on the English character that any writer ever did exercise.
mt: 作为一名被男孩们阅读的作家，马里亚特——20 岁时，男孩们对他的欣赏已经变得过于迟钝——可能通过男孩们对英国人的性格产生了任何作家都无法比拟的最大影响。

src: Throughout the 1980s the government made attempt after attempt to control and curb local government expenditure through cash limits, rate-capping and grant withdrawal.
mt: 在整个 20 世纪 80 年代，政府通过现金限制、利率上限和补助撤回等方式，试图控制和遏制地方政府支出。

src: Well I wouldn't worry too much about cramming it all together tightly because it's erm one of the few things we've still got a budget for is photocopying student questionnaires so you m you know, you might as well take advantage of that, it doesn't erm it doesn't cost you anything and the actual difference it makes to the university and to erm world resources is very slight indeed I think
mt: 嗯，我不会太担心把它们都紧密地塞在一起，因为这是我们预算中为数不多的几样东西之一，我们还有预算来复印学生问卷，所以你也可以利用这一点，它不会花费你任何东西，它对大学和世界资源的实际影响确实很小，我想

src: The lady has, so far as I know, done no harm in the Lords — no one having seen her except on one occasion when she went there to lunch — and she has yet to make her maiden speech.
mt: 据我所知，这位女士在贵族院没有做过什么坏事——除了有一次她去那里吃午饭，没有人见过她——她还没有发表过她的处女演讲。

src: We would argue then, that knowledge workers, distinct from most managers, do make significant use of external publicly available information sources.
mt: 我们认为，知识工作者与大多数管理者不同，他们确实会大量使用外部公开的信息源。

src: Rose made no comment.
mt: 罗斯没有发表任何评论。

src: Once the barcodes on the items have been scanned and the tabulated amount displayed, the purchaser could present a direct debit card (or a charge card) to make payment.
mt: 在扫描商品条形码并显示总金额后，购买者可以出示借记卡（或信用卡）进行支付。

src: Janine took a deep breath and all the fears and worries inside her came tumbling out like a great canker that had finally burst.
mt: 珍妮深吸了一口气，她内心的恐惧和担忧像一个终于破裂的巨大溃疡一样倾泻而出。

src: As he cut she gave an almighty push and ripped open to her behind.
mt: 当他割开时，她用力一推，撕开了她的后方。

src: Once you can do this without the aid of the locator, you will have the satisfaction of knowing that your own skills alone will enable you to make use of this last-ditch method of rescue.
mt: 一旦你可以在没有定位器帮助的情况下做到这一点，你就会知道，只有靠自己的技能才能使用这种最后的救援方法。

src: But, at the risk of falling into this trap and adding wanking to the list of topics to talk about when I do an interview, I have to say that if you don't wank, if you don't have any orgasms, then your life isn't worth living.
mt: 但是，我冒着掉进这个陷阱的风险，在采访时把自慰加入到话题列表中，我必须说，如果你不自慰，如果你没有性高潮，那么你的生活就不值得活下去。

src: Very little was left to chance and great attention was given to every detail of publicity so that posters, signs, displays, and press advertisements made the maximum impact.
mt: 几乎没有留下任何机会，并且对宣传的每一个细节都给予了极大的关注，因此海报、标志、展示和新闻广告产生了最大的影响。

src: Reluctantly, Johnson accepted their advice, and on 31 March 1968 he made a dramatic appearance on nationwide television to announce a fresh peace initiative, the reduction of bombing raids on North Vietnam, and his decision not to stand for re-election in November.
mt: 约翰逊不情愿地接受了他们的建议，并于 1968 年 3 月 31 日在全国电视上戏剧性地露面，宣布了一项新的和平倡议，减少对北越的轰炸袭击，并宣布他决定不在 11 月参加连任选举。

src: Joan Watt, our physiotherapist, gave me a massage.
mt: 我们的理疗师琼·瓦特给我做了一次按摩。

src: Then George Potter retired in 1966, leaving this nucleus of magnolias, we felt it was a good foundation to build on, although we were careful to make a selection rather than a collection.
mt: 1966 年，乔治·波特退休，留下了这片玉兰树核心地带，我们觉得这是个不错的基础，尽管我们当时小心谨慎，只做了一次选择，而不是一次收集。

src: We have absolute commitment to a high-quality National Health Service, free at time of need and not fractured and weakened by underfunding and a commercialised contract system.
mt: 我们绝对致力于建立一个高质量的国家医疗服务体系，在需要的时候免费提供服务，不会因为资金不足和商业化合同体系而支离破碎和削弱。

src: BR made an immediate start on the backlog of maintenance, including repairs to Ribblehead viaduct.
mt: BR 立即开始进行积压的维护工作，包括修复 Ribblehead 高架桥。

src: If artists gather in stables then New York in the summertime is a veritable art rodeo: group shows abound and it is a matchless time to take the measure of any given gallery.
mt: 如果艺术家们聚集在马厩里，那么纽约的夏天就是一场名副其实的艺术罗德奥：团体展比比皆是，这是衡量任何一家画廊的无与伦比的时刻。

src: In order to establish a trust fund to cover this, and the maintenance of the college's picture collection, the Charity Commissioners, after over two years of deliberation, have given permission for the sale of three paintings: a Turner, a Constable and a Gainsborough.
mt: 为了建立一个信托基金来支付这笔费用，以及维护学院的图片收藏，慈善专员经过两年多的审议，已经批准出售三幅画：一幅是特纳的，一幅是康斯特布尔的，还有一幅是盖恩斯伯勒的。

src: Anne made a good recovery from her illness and three weeks later was back in circulation.
mt: 安妮从病中康复得很好，三周后就恢复了工作。

src: But some dermatologists believe that today's skin products can do more harm than good.
mt: 但一些皮肤科医生认为，如今的护肤品弊大于利。

src: The ringisho (request for a decision) goes back and forth and eventually a consensus is achieved among the interested parties, with the president giving his final approval.
mt: ringisho（决策请求）来回传递，最终在相关各方之间达成共识，由总统给予最终批准。

src: Sometimes it may be necessary to give a concession simply to secure the sale.
mt: 有时，为了确保销售，可能需要做出让步。

src: Pacifists in the ILP and BSP, Jones argued, had done more harm to the working-class movement than could have been inflicted by the Municipal Alliance.
mt: 琼斯认为，ILP 和 BSP 中的和平主义者对工人阶级运动造成的伤害比市政联盟造成的伤害更大。

src: The elegant, elongated purple leaves of Setcreasea purpurea make a good display
mt: Setcreasea purpurea 的紫色叶子优雅、细长，可以很好地展示出来

src: And did they do any Did they do a trade comparable to the Cooperative?
mt: 他们有没有做过类似于合作社的交易？

src: Since he was to be the founder of the service of carols and nine lessons, he made a permanent mark on English, and not only English, life and religion.
mt: 作为颂歌和九课服务的创始人，他对英语产生了永久的影响，不仅对英语，还对生活和宗教。

src: At breakfast together Fisher exploded and attacked the Church Union and all that it stood for and said that they had done great harm and ought to apologize.
mt: 一起吃早餐时，费舍尔爆发了，他攻击教会联盟及其所代表的一切，并说他们造成了巨大的伤害，应该道歉。

src: we did translation, Xenophon, I do not know a word of it I do not think Greek alone makes me miserable, I am always miserable.
mt: 我们做了翻译，色诺芬，我一个字都不懂，我不认为只有希腊语会让我痛苦，我总是痛苦的。

src: If they last twenty years before being replaced they have done a good service.
mt: 如果它们能持续使用二十年，那么它们就做出了很好的贡献。

src: A huddle of passengers gathered round the steps of the carriage to get a look at the reading and, lest their breathing distort the figure, Nadia held it aloft like a fish between finger and thumb.
mt: 一群乘客聚集在车厢的台阶上，想看一看这幅画，为了不使他们的呼吸扭曲这幅画，纳迪亚像用手指和拇指夹住一条鱼一样把它举了起来。

src: PREMIER John Major was given some Christmas cheer last night when top economists forecast economic revival in Britain next year.
mt: 首相约翰·梅杰昨晚收到了一些圣诞节的欢声笑语，当时顶级经济学家预测英国明年经济复苏。

src: Julie screamed and took a step back.
mt: 朱莉尖叫着后退了一步。

src: I take a sip of beer, of lager.
mt: 我喝了一口啤酒，淡啤酒。

src: And I have to say that we're talking about a limited number of people, that even if you deter half a dozen young fire setters in a year, you'd probably made a fairly substantial impact in Shropshire.
mt: 我必须说，我们谈论的是有限的人数，即使你一年阻止了六名纵火者，你可能也会对什罗普郡产生相当大的影响。

src: Would you, would you like to do a group collaboration on this one, because erm, can you come up with a version that your group agrees on?
mt: 您愿意在这个问题上进行小组合作吗？因为呃，您能想出一个小组都同意的版本吗？

src: We should have an enquiry, whether it's Mallard
mt: 我们应该进行调查，看看是不是马拉德

src: It is too soon yet to make a judgement about the relative importance of these different factors.
mt: 现在判断这些不同因素的相对重要性还为时过早。

src: Longman's are doing a study into the spoken language, and are looking for, I think, ninety million words that are in common usage.
mt: Longman 正在对口语进行研究，我想他们正在寻找九千万个常用词。

src: Now, I think once we've established that, we can have argument about whether members need more assistance, but at least we're arguing on the same basis, aren't we?
mt: 现在，我认为，一旦我们确定了这一点，我们就可以讨论成员是否需要更多帮助，但至少我们是在同样的基础上进行讨论，不是吗？

src: I am Mrs who's sort of the secretary and books, does the booking for the hall, he couldn't get that, anyway it occurred to me afterwards it must of been the grandmother of that girl that bought the erm, cos he kept on talking a Michelle and that's the girl that bought our suite and I reckon it's her child's birthday party, she said erm you know my, you know my son-in-law, I said do I?
mt: 我是秘书兼图书管理员，负责预订大厅，他没预订到，不管怎样，后来我想一定是那个女孩的祖母买的，因为她一直说米雪儿，就是那个买了我们套房的女孩，我想应该是她孩子的生日派对，她说，呃，你知道我的，你知道我的女婿，我说，我认识吗？

src: Oh look Terry I've done an advertisement in the back
mt: 哦，特里，我做了一个广告放在后面

src: A late claim will not be accepted where the delay is due to: oversight or negligence on the part of the claimant company or its agent; failure without good reason to compute the necessary figure; and a desire to avoid establishing the claim pending clarification of the effects of making a claim on other tax liabilities.
mt: 如果延迟是由于：索赔公司或其代理人的疏忽或过失；没有正当理由未能计算必要的数字；以及在澄清索赔对其他税收义务的影响之前，希望避免确定索赔，则不接受延迟索赔。

src: Hanson made its first big UK acquisition in 1981 when it bought Berec, the maker of Ever Ready batteries.
LVC_candidate: make its first big UK acquisition
mt: 1981 年，汉森公司收购了 Ever Ready 电池制造商 Berec，这是该公司在英国的首次重大收购。

src: By the time I came to do my first talk, her feathers were a lovely tawny colour with large patches flecked with grey and smaller specks of black and white.
mt: 当我第一次来做演讲时，她的羽毛是可爱的棕黄色，有大块的灰色斑点和黑色和白色的小斑点。

src: At the time I was in the throes of training Dawn and it seemed obvious that I should do my talk on the owl.
mt: 当时，我正在训练 Dawn，很明显，我应该把我的演讲主题定为猫头鹰。

src: We were in the sports hall and she flew right up on to the top of the climbing frame at the far end from where I was giving my little lecture.
mt: 当时我们在体育馆里，她飞到了攀爬架的顶端，而我正在讲课。

src: Now what was required then was that although the job was in a rush, the management had to telephone down to the Admiralty in Bath to get the appropriate sanction you know, to, to accept the cylinder with the er bigger gauge bore.
mt: 现在，当时需要的是，虽然工作很紧急，但管理层必须打电话给巴斯的海军部，以获得适当的批准，你知道，接受气缸，呃，更大的计量孔。

src: And we've been waiting and waiting and waiting now for a week to get this reconciliation at least together so that we could go out and re-count whatever was required.
mt: 我们已经等了一个星期，希望至少能达成和解，这样我们就可以出去重新计算所需的票数。

src: When the Girls left to get married at the end of each show, rather than risk Jennie's haphazard choice of replacements, she sent over the two Head Girls who were almost resident in America, Rene Todd or Dorothy Sabine, to make their own selection.
mt: 每场演出结束后，当女孩们离开去结婚时，为了避免 Jennie 随意选择替补，她派了两个几乎住在美国的 Head Girl，Rene Todd 或 Dorothy Sabine，来进行她们自己的选择。
